description: Style NoteGift set of Wallet and BeltWondering what to give that special someone as a gift? Your search is over with this classy combination!Sleek cabarelli wallet crafted from pure leather, slim enough to slip inside your jacket or hip pocket without spoiling the silhouette of your ensemble. Adds a quirky yet classy aesthetic into your sartorial choice for the day, when you snap this wallet out.A tonal Cabarelli belt comes with the purchase of this wallet. Now you don't have to worry about matching your different accessories as Cabarelli does the job for you.Product DetailsBrown leather two-fold wallet with a flap on the leftHas two main compartments, three card slots, two insert pockets, one buttoned pocket on the right and two id card holder slots on the flapComes with a black and brown reversible leather belt with holes and a press clasp closureMaterial and CareLeatherWipe wallet with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlightSizeWallet dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmBelt length: 111 cm
